subcodes.first_line: O ye two well-loved handmaids of God! Whatever a man's tongue speaketh, that let him prove by his deeds. If he claimeth to be a believer
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو کنیز عزیز الهی انسان آنچه بلسان گوید باید باعمال و افعال اثبات کند اگر
subcodes.subjects: @education of children; moral education, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @praise and encouragement, @exhortations and counsels, @words vs deeds
